prompt_text:
### Demographics: 57-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 11 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Despite repeated counseling on insulin need, the patient strongly refuses injections; shared decision was made to intensify oral therapy and reassess within 2-4 weeks.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Rheumatoid Arthritis
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 77.4 kg; Height 163.7 cm; BMI 28.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 129/72 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.1%; 9 months ago 8.5%; 6 months ago 9.0%; 3 months ago 9.4%; current 10.0%), FPG (12 months ago 167mg/dL; 9 months ago 178mg/dL; 6 months ago 217mg/dL; 3 months ago 265mg/dL; current 300mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 76.3kg; 9 months ago 78.2kg; 6 months ago 77.9kg; 3 months ago 74.8kg; current 77.4kg), Height (12 months ago 163.7cm; 9 months ago 163.7cm; 6 months ago 163.7cm; 3 months ago 163.7cm; current 163.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 28.0kg/m²; current 28.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 131mmHg; 9 months ago 132mmHg; 6 months ago 130mmHg; 3 months ago 129mmHg; current 129mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 68mmHg; 9 months ago 69mmHg; 6 months ago 69mmHg; 3 months ago 71mmHg; current 72mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 27U/L; 9 months ago 20U/L; 6 months ago 18U/L; 3 months ago 25U/L; current 22U/L), AST (12 months ago 31U/L; 9 months ago 24U/L; 6 months ago 30U/L; 3 months ago 26U/L; current 28U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 74mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 73mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 74mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 71mL/min/1.73m²; current 71mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 65mg/g; 9 months ago 48mg/g; 6 months ago 63mg/g; 3 months ago 51mg/g; current 57mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 100mg/dL; 9 months ago 92mg/dL; 6 months ago 95mg/dL; 3 months ago 98mg/dL; current 96mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 50mg/dL; 9 months ago 46mg/dL; 6 months ago 50mg/dL; 3 months ago 49mg/dL; current 48mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 92mg/dL; 9 months ago 95mg/dL; 6 months ago 94mg/dL; 3 months ago 97mg/dL; current 104mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.7g/dL; 9 months ago 11.7g/dL; 6 months ago 12.4g/dL; 3 months ago 11.7g/dL; current 12.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited. Strong injection refusal is documented; under shared decision-making, the patient accepts oral regimen adjustment with short-interval reassessment.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
